Hi — I'm built into the desktop now. I can search files, change settings, or just chat.
Runs fully offline in this demo — no API keys or external requests are made.

Allow Windows 12 Copilot to use your microphone for voice conversations?

Copilot will only listen while you're actively speaking to it. You can change this anytime in Settings.

Widgets

Choose which widgets appear on your Widgets board.

Sounds

The system scans for each expected sound file at startup. Missing files automatically fall back to a generated tone.

Devices

Connect or disconnect a simulated device.

Phone Link device
Disconnected

Import

Add your own files, images, or a website onto the Windows 12 Concept desktop. Everything is scanned first — unsafe or self-referential items are blocked.

Add Files / Images / More
Opens your system's file picker. Supports images, videos, and documents.
Add apps from your desktop
A browser can't silently scan your real desktop — this opens the same file picker so you can select the files yourself. Anything that looks like a game install gets flagged automatically.
Add a website

About

This is a fictional, fan-made concept — not a real Microsoft product.
